description: Bounded meta-knobs the capability reviewer may auto-tune (never weakens pre-trade gate or immutable caps).

winning_pattern_share_target.notes: Phase-1 realistic target when portfolio patterns are net negative.

edge_autofix_rr_boost_cap.notes: Caps session RR margin boost from edge autofix.

edge_autofix_min_exits.notes: Minimum exits before edge autofix fires (reduce noise on quiet days).

rth_review_cadence_mult.notes: Multiplier on RTH SI interval when objectives off-track (<1 = more frequent).

session_si_critical_expectancy_usd.notes: Session expectancy threshold for critical mode (more negative = less aggressive).

rolling_edge_autofix_strength.notes: Scales rolling-aware edge autofix when session scorecard is green but rolling metrics lag.

symbol_session_loss_brake_mult.notes: Multiplier on per-symbol session loss brake thresholds.

unified_loser_trim_pct_equity.notes: Unrealized loss as fraction of equity before adaptive partial trim.

unified_loser_trim_fraction.notes: Fraction of position to trim when loser threshold exceeded.

classic_fill_recency_days_max.notes: Adaptive max days since last Classic fill before recency gap fires.

singularity_aggression_mult.notes: Scales surpass-mode SI escalation when floor objectives are met.

singularity_aspire_lift_pct.notes: Fraction to lift dynamic aspire targets each singularity compound cycle.

max_rolling_drawdown_pct.notes: Portfolio rolling drawdown ceiling — blocks aspire target lifts when breached (SI-HOLD).

min_rolling_expectancy_usd.notes: PerformanceMonitor revert floor for rolling expectancy (max -0.05 = cannot loosen vs default).

expectancy_regression_usd.notes: PerformanceMonitor revert when baseline minus rolling expectancy exceeds this (max 0.03 = tighten-only).

max_drawdown_threshold.notes: PerformanceMonitor revert when rolling max drawdown fraction reaches threshold (max 0.15 = tighten-only).

min_monitoring_days.notes: Days before PerformanceMonitor may revert an active change (max 7 = cannot delay monitoring).

strong_tape_min_exits.notes: Minimum combined swarm exits expected on strong-tape days (SPY 1d >= 0.35%) for participation objective.
